_notes: City Kit Commercial. Scale 12 (unified with the 12 m city roads; building-a ~15 m / 3 storeys, skyscraper-a ~35 m). low-detail-* is the distant-skyline set (scale_mul 10 -> effective 120, sized to read on the horizon) and detail-* are facade decorations (awnings/overhangs/parasols) — both unreachable, so none.
